item.title: Canada joins next-generation fighter jet programme led by UK, Italy and Japan
item.summary: Canada has joined the Global Combat Air Programme as an observer nation. This move allows privileged access to the UK, Italy, and Japan-led initiative. The program aims to develop a sixth-generation stealth fighter jet by 2035. Canada's participation diversifies its defense partnerships beyond the United States. This inclusion marks the program's first expansion since its 2022 launch.
